description: Offline replay dashboard template derived from NVIDIA Dynamo grafana-dynamo-dashboard-configmap.yaml. Export finalization filters panels against metric families present in data.openmetrics.

targets.expr: sum by (nemo_rl_endpoint, model) (rate(dynamo_component_request_duration_seconds_sum{nemo_rl_endpoint=~"$endpoint",model=~"$model"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (nemo_rl_endpoint, model) (rate(dynamo_component_request_duration_seconds_count{nemo_rl_endpoint=~"$endpoint",model=~"$model"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.description: Time to first token in seconds
panels.title: Frontend Avg Time to First Token
Dynamo work handler time to first response

title: NeMo RL Dynamo Prometheus Replay Template
